package.name: hw_bringup
package.description: Real-hardware bringup (Phase 4 STUB — not yet flown): launch + connection config for running the SAME common_control / common_missions autonomy on a real Pixhawk 6 + Orange Pi 5 Plus, over a uXRCE-DDS serial link. Mirrors sim_bringup; the only differences are the DDS transport (serial vs UDP), the sensor source (RealSense vs simulated), and the params file — never the flight logic. Untested until real hardware exists.
